extraction.one_line_summary: LAFAY Victor won with a late solo attack inside 1km after UAE controlled the Jaizkibel ascent, Pogačar sprinted for bonus seconds.
tactical_patterns: UAE controlled Jaizkibel tempo (16.5km out) despite Yates in yellow, prioritizing Pogačar bonus seconds over defending.
MIES Rafael attack on Jaizkibel dropped Pinot/Landa, creating unexpected GC selection on category-2 climb.
Jumbo-Visma policed late attacks despite no sprint interest, suggesting defensive GC posture rather than stage hunting.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: UAE worked for his bonus seconds despite teammate Yates in yellow, revealing team hierarchy
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: positive: hung with GC group over Jaizkibel despite riding emotionally after Mader tribute
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: neutral: survived Jaizkibel with GC group but didn't contest finale, unclear role in stage racing
rider_signals.LAFAY Victor: positive: first Tour stage in 15 years for Cofidis, timed 1km attack perfectly against inattentive Jumbo
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: dropped on Jaizkibel 16.5km out alongside Pinot, early GC weakness signal
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: distanced by Mies attack on Jaizkibel, worrying form before mountains
